german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Mostly Unnecessary
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant majority of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility challenges.

pm_type.title: Customer-facing PMs Dominate Role Landscape
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between customer-facing and core PM roles, highlighting a concentration in specialized positions.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Market
seniority.subtitle: Over half of the positions are filled by senior-level professionals, indicating a strong demand for experienced talent.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates with Limited Flexibility
work_mode.subtitle: A significant majority of roles require on-site presence, with minimal remote options available.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: All opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with no remote or unclear options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Now Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 32% of roles require AI as a core responsibility or skill.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Strong Balance and Diversity
industry.subtitle: No single role dominates, but unclassified positions limit overall accessibility.
